content: Dark-palette pitfalls: pure white on pure black passes WCAG but causes halation (glow) for astigmatic users — use off-white #E0E0E0–#F0F0F0 text on #121212–#1E1E1E; highly saturated colors (pure red/green/blue) 'vibrate'/bleed on dark backgrounds even when the ratio passes — desaturate + lighten accents for dark mode; dark theme must independently pass 4.5:1 normal text and 3:1 large text/UI components. Sources: BOIA, DubBot, accessibilitychecker.org, colorarchive.
